'''chacholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swager|swager]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swager|swager]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chacholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæcheleth|chæcheleth]] || [[word:chæchelej|chæchelej]] || [[word:chæchelesh|chæchelesh]] || [[word:chæchele|chæchele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachocholoth|chachocholoth]] || [[word:chachocholoj|chachocholoj]] || [[word:chachocholosh|chachocholosh]] || [[word:chachocholo|chachocholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chacholoth|chacholoth]] || [[word:chacholoj|chacholoj]] || [[word:chacholosh|chacholosh]] || [[word:chacholo|chacholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachofloth|chachofloth]] || [[word:chachofloj|chachofloj]] || [[word:chachoflosh|chachoflosh]] || [[word:chachoflof|chachoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chacholotho|chacholotho]] || [[word:chacholojo|chacholojo]] || [[word:chacholosho|chacholosho]] || [[word:chacholoko|chacholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chacholoth|chacholoth]] || [[word:chacholoj|chacholoj]] || [[word:chacholosh|chacholosh]] || [[word:chacholo|chacholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chacholothol|chacholothol]] || [[word:chacholojol|chacholojol]] || [[word:chacholoshol|chacholoshol]] || [[word:chacholokol|chacholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chacholothotho|chacholothotho]] || [[word:chacholojojo|chacholojojo]] || [[word:chacholoshosho|chacholoshosho]] || [[word:chacholoko|chacholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chacholothon|chacholothon]] || [[word:chacholojon|chacholojon]] || [[word:chacholoshon|chacholoshon]] || [[word:chacholokon|chacholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chacholothoro|chacholothoro]] || [[word:chacholojoro|chacholojoro]] || [[word:chacholoshoro|chacholoshoro]] || [[word:chacholokoro|chacholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
